laws.title: Public Law 32-231 | District Improvement Act (DIA)
laws.status_basis: The source record is marked fully repealed, and the act is retained only as public-law history; no live Code insertion is warranted.

current_implementation.detail: No matching implementation was found in the current branch XML.

laws.recommended_action: Leave the act out of the Code and preserve it only as repealed history.

laws.title: Public Law 32-232 | The Federal Pay Standardization Act
laws.status_basis: Section 5(a) directly rewrites 5 U.S.C. 5332(a), and the current branch already carries the incorporated pay-table text.

current_implementation.detail: The current branch includes the integrated General Schedule text and amendment note.

laws.recommended_action: No additional Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 32-233 | Literally Introducing Taxes (LIT)
laws.status_basis: Section 5 repeals 26 U.S.C. 1 and replaces it with the flat tax text, and the current branch already reflects that incorporation.

current_implementation.detail: The current branch carries the tax-section amendment history and the incorporated replacement text.

laws.recommended_action: No additional Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 32-234 | Intelligence Appointment Transparency and Oversight Act
laws.status_basis: Sections 3 and 4 add 50 U.S.C. 3041 subsection (d) and expand subsection (b)(2), and the current branch already contains those amendments.

current_implementation.detail: The current branch includes subsection (d) and the updated concurrence list.

laws.recommended_action: No additional Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 32-235 | Command Responsibility And Noncompliance Enforcement (CRANE) Act
laws.status_basis: The act is classified as commemorative rather than permanent Code material, so it should remain outside the Code.

current_implementation.detail: No Code insertion is expected for this enactment.

laws.recommended_action: Leave the act as public-law history only.

laws.title: Public Law 32-236 | Military Operational Authority Reform Act
laws.status_basis: Sections 4 and 5 amend 10 U.S.C. 153 and 154, and the current branch already carries those changes.

current_implementation.detail: The current branch includes the amended section 153 and section 154 text plus the amendment notes.

laws.recommended_action: No additional Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 33-238 | Conference Oversight of Discipline and Ethics Act
laws.status_basis: The enactment is general and permanent but does not supply a clean positive-law rewrite target; it belongs as a statutory note at 28 U.S.C. 526.

current_implementation.detail: No matching statutory-note entry was found in the current branch XML.

laws.recommended_action: Add a concise statutory note at 28 U.S.C. 526 if the act is to be carried into the Code.

laws.title: Public Law 34-239 | Judicial Recall Act
laws.status_basis: The source is predominantly temporary or self-expiring and does not warrant permanent Code insertion.

current_implementation.detail: No current Code implementation is expected for this enactment.

laws.recommended_action: Retain the law only as public-law history.

laws.title: Public Law 34-240 | Literally Fixing Taxes
laws.status_basis: The law is treated as retired in the source chain, and the current branch preserves it only as historical note material at 26 U.S.C. 1.

current_implementation.detail: The current branch already retains this law as statutory history only.

laws.recommended_action: Keep only the historical note and do not restore live tax text.

laws.title: Public Law 34-241 | Protecting Working Americans
laws.status_basis: Chronology ties the law to the Title 5 pay-table chain, where it revises the prior pay-standardization enactment; the current branch does not yet contain this later amendment.

current_implementation.detail: No PL-034-241 implementation was found in the current branch XML.

laws.recommended_action: Apply the revised pay table to 5 U.S.C. 5332 and trim any note-only treatment.
